purpose: Define the repo-source line budget as a scheduled advisory maintenance signal with an explicit strict ratchet mode for maintainers and daily structure jobs.
machine_boundary: This contract owns line-budget thresholds and reviewed oversized-file baselines for tracked source files. It does not define domain truth, production readiness, release readiness, or quality verdict authority.

reviewed_baselines.reason: reviewed historical runtime completion entry; scheduled structure maintenance continues semantic thinning
reviewed_baselines.intended_boundary: agent lab completion entry remains stable while subresponsibilities move to focused agent-lab modules

reviewed_baselines.reason: reviewed historical stage-attempt surface; scheduled structure maintenance continues durable attempt primitive thinning
reviewed_baselines.intended_boundary: stage attempt public surface stays stable while query, closeout, and provider-specific helpers move to focused modules

reviewed_baselines.reason: reviewed historical app drilldown aggregator; scheduled structure maintenance continues projection group reorganization by semantic owner
reviewed_baselines.intended_boundary: app drilldown entry should become a thin semantic aggregator over evidence, routes, provider, detail, and summary packages

reviewed_baselines.reason: reviewed historical agent-lab test file; scheduled structure maintenance continues behavior-case movement by feature axis
reviewed_baselines.intended_boundary: agent lab tests should split by task manifest, recovery, efficiency, promotion, and completion behavior

reviewed_baselines.reason: reviewed historical domain-pack compiler CLI case; scheduled structure maintenance continues independent compiler scenario movement to case files
reviewed_baselines.intended_boundary: domain pack compiler tests should split by fixture, compiler contract, drift manifest, and real-repo smoke behavior

reviewed_baselines.reason: reviewed historical app drilldown CLI case; scheduled structure maintenance continues projection-specific test movement to scoped cases
reviewed_baselines.intended_boundary: app drilldown tests should split by detail, summary, action routes, provider evidence, domain payloads, and app release evidence
